IXACTWmaPlayList::Next

Transitions to the next song in an XACT WMA playlist.

HRESULT Next();

Parameters

None.

Return Values

Returns DS_OK if successful; returns an error code otherwise.

Requirements

Header: Declared in XACT.h.

Import Library: Use XACTEng.lib.
